darshan.prasad: Prasad is distributed inside the temple on many occasions after bhog

Gomti Ghat.discription: Sacred bathing ghat on the Gomti River where pilgrims take a holy dip before visiting the Dwarkadhish Temple.

Sudama Setu.discription: Pedestrian suspension bridge over the Gomti River, named after Lord Krishna's childhood friend Sudama, offering beautiful views of Dwarka and the river.

Rukmini Devi Temple.discription: Ancient temple dedicated to Goddess Rukmini, the chief queen of Lord Krishna, renowned for its intricate carvings and the legend of Sage Durvasa's curse.

Bhadkeshwar Mahadev Temple.discription: Ancient Lord Shiva temple built on a rocky islet in the Arabian Sea, famous for being surrounded by seawater during high tide and offering stunning sunset views.

food.Free Prasad: Outside the temple there are also several charitable bhojnalayas and satsang organizations that occasionally serve free prasad

Package 3.name: Dwarka to Beyt Dwarka Trip by Cab

YatraDham Package.cab: YatraDham cab service also available at same Package number
